title: Allogene (ALLO) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Allogene Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript (May 13, 2026). Key Participants: David D. Chang (President/CEO), Zachary J. Roberts (EVP R&D/CMO), Geoffrey Parker (CFO), Christine Cassiano (Chief Communications Officer). ALPHA-3 SemiCell Trial: Interim futility showed 58.3% MRD clearance rate vs 16.7% in observation arm (41.6% absolute difference). Circulating tumor DNA decreased 98% in treatment vs 26% increase in observation. No CRS, neurotoxicity, or treatment-related hospitalization. Clinical Expansion: Enrolling across 60+ global sites. Regulatory approvals in Australia and South Korea. One-third of patients at community centers. Target 80+ global sites. ALLO-329 Autoimmune: Nine patients treated since November 2025. Dose escalation cohorts. Next dose 80 million cells. Early signs of clinical activity with favorable tolerability. Financial: $266.9M cash as of March 31. $200.4M raised April. Runway through 2029. 2026 guidance: $165M operating cash expenses.
